app.title: Decode the Phrase!
app.subtitle: Follow the chain and collect the hidden message

puzzle.wrongRow: Not that row! Look for the right phrase on the left side.

result.complete: Well done! You decoded the phrase!

help.title: How to Play
help.goal: Your goal is to decode a hidden phrase by following a chain of clues.

steps.title: Step by step:
steps.1: You start with a phrase shown at the top of the screen.
steps.2: Find the row where the left side matches the current phrase and tap it.
steps.3: Each correct tap collects a syllable and reveals the next phrase to look for.
steps.4: Keep going until all syllables are collected — they spell out the hidden phrase!

hints.title: Tips:
hints.1: Use the Hint button if you get stuck — it highlights the correct row.
hints.2: After 3 wrong taps in a row, a free hint appears automatically.
hints.3: Fewer mistakes and hints = more stars!

scoring.title: Scoring:
scoring.stars2: 2 stars — up to 2 mistakes, up to 1 hint
